TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mansyu go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 147.35 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 74.2 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 7.17 km²), 1,329 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 490 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 802 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 60%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Mansyu go hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mansyu go hya' ga Botan go. ays ptyaw sebu Mansyu go ays psgayun 8 ru 3 alang. 3 alang hani ga, Ride , Parius , Tjadukudukung .
S.PHON: mans~ɕju ɣo mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na mans~ɕju ɣo ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mans~ɕju ɣo ħjaʔ ɣa βotan ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu mans~ɕju ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, ri*e , parius~ɕ , tja*uku*ukuŋ .
S.FORM: Mansyu go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 147.35 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 74.2 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 7.17 km²), 1,329 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 490 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 802 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 60%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Mansyu go hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mansyu go hya' ga Botan go. ays ptyaw sebu Mansyu go ays psgayun 8 ru 3 alang. 3 alang hani ga, Ride , Parius , Tjadukudukung .
S.PHON: mans~ɕju ɣo mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na mans~ɕju ɣo ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mans~ɕju ɣo ħjaʔ ɣa βotan ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu mans~ɕju ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, ri*e , parius~ɕ , tja*uku*ukuŋ .
